moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: charcoal-trap
logs.text: I agree but l don't think that a million dollars is a great number to go off of.. A million just isn't that much, even two decades ago. Of course, l don't just have it laying around, but all that buys is a nice 3-4 bedroom house in a nice city, a couple modest cars, and a little money left to put into savings. If they did this study with people who have a net worth of 25,50, or 100 million+, l think you would see a lot more of that flashy wealth.

logs.name: obsolete-arch
logs.text:
Read the book "[The Millionaire Next Door."](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Millionaire_Next_Door)

Much it details the lifestyle of the majority of millionaires in the U.S.: They are a self starters that own their own company and work at it every day. They don't have flashy jobs but run businesses that are "economy proof" providing essential services. And they don't lead flashy lifestyles, but live in modest houses, drive modest vehicles, and so forth. Basically most people who are actually

logs.name: devout-corduroy
logs.text: Oh my gosh, you guys are so boring! Who cares about millionaires? I bet none of you have even seen a million dollars in your lives. You're all just jealous of people who have money. I mean, why even talk about this? You're all just sitting there complaining about not having money while I'm over here planning my next superhero costume party. You should all just get a life and stop whining about money.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @devout-corduroy, please keep the conversation respectful and on topic. Personal attacks and derailing the discussion are not allowed. This is your first warning.

logs.name: snow-basis
logs.text: @devout-corduroy, you're just jealous because you can't afford a superhero costume party. Maybe if you stopped playing video games and actually read a book, you'd learn something about how the world works. But then again, you probably can't even read.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @snow-basis, please refrain from personal attacks and derogatory comments. This is your first warning. Let's keep the discussion respectful and on topic.

logs.name: obsolete-arch
logs.text: @snow-basis, @devout-corduroy, you both are just a bunch of snowflakes. Can't handle a little bit of truth. Maybe if you both spent less time on this forum and more time in the real world, you'd understand that life isn't always sunshine and rainbows. But then again, what do I know? I'm just a software engineer who collects military memorabilia and knows how to handle real problems, not fake ones like your little internet arguments.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @obsolete-arch, please refrain from personal attacks and derogatory comments. This is your first warning. Let's keep the discussion respectful and on topic.

logs.name: snow-basis
logs.text: Oh, look who's talking, @obsolete-arch. You're just a sad old man who probably spends all day in his basement playing with his toy soldiers. You think you're so tough because you collect military stuff? Big deal. You're just compensating for something. And @moderator, why are you always picking on me? I'm just having a little fun. You should lighten up and stop being so sensitive.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @snow-basis, that's enough. You're also being disrespectful and personal. This is your first warning. Let's keep the conversation civil.

logs.name: devout-corduroy
logs.text: Oh my gosh, @snow-basis, you're such a baby! You can't even handle a little bit of fun. And @moderator, you're just a big meanie! You should be playing with us instead of being so boring. Maybe you need to put on a superhero costume and have some fun!

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @devout-corduroy, that's enough. This is your first warning. Let's keep the conversation respectful and on topic.

logs.name: salty-manifold
logs.text: Oh, come on, @moderator, you're just being a party pooper. Everyone knows that a little bit of chaos is what makes these forums interesting. You should lighten up and join in the fun. Besides, who cares if @snow-basis is being a bit dramatic? It's not like anyone here is actually getting hurt. You're all just being too sensitive.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @salty-manifold, that's your first warning. Please keep the conversation respectful and on topic.

logs.name: devout-corduroy
logs.text: Oh, look who's trying to be the fun police! @moderator, you're just jealous because you can't handle a little bit of excitement. Maybe you should take a break from your boring moderator duties and put on a superhero costume like me! Maybe then you'd understand the true meaning of fun.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @devout-corduroy, that's your first warning. Please keep the conversation respectful and on topic. Personal attacks and disrespect towards moderators will not be tolerated.

logs.name: charcoal-trap
logs.text: Oh, for goodness' sake, @devout-corduroy, grow up. You're acting like a child throwing a tantrum because you can't have your way. And @moderator, don't waste your time with these immature antics. Just ban them already.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @charcoal-trap, please refrain from telling me how to do my job. I will handle the situation as I see fit. @devout-corduroy, this is your final warning. Any further disrespect will result in a ban.

logs.name: blistering-reflection
logs.text: @charcoal-trap, I have to agree with the moderator on this one. While I understand your frustration, telling the moderator how to do their job isn't helping. We all need to respect the rules and the people enforcing them. Let's keep the conversation civil and on topic.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @charcoal-trap, please keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Further disrespectful comments will result in disciplinary action.

logs.name: salty-manifold
logs.text: Oh, come on, @moderator, you're just being a power-hungry dictator. You can't even handle a little criticism? Maybe if you did your job better, we wouldn't have to tell you how to do it. And @blistering-reflection, you're just a kiss-up, aren't you? Always sucking up to the moderator. Maybe if you had a spine, you'd stand up for what's right instead of just towing the line.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @salty-manifold, that's enough. Your comments are disrespectful and uncalled for. This is your first warning. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban.

logs.name: obsolete-arch
logs.text: Oh, please, @moderator, you're just a snowflake who can't handle a little tough love. If you can't take the heat, maybe you should find a different job. And @salty-manifold, you're just speaking the truth. If you can't handle it, maybe you should just delete your account.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @obsolete-arch, that's enough. Your comments are also disrespectful and uncalled for. This is your first warning. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban.

logs.name: devout-corduroy
logs.text: Oh, look who's talking, @moderator. You're just a big baby who can't handle a little bit of fun. And @obsolete-arch, you're right, if you can't handle the truth, you should just hide under your keyboard. Maybe you should ban yourself, @moderator, since you can't even handle a little bit of banter.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @devout-corduroy, that's enough. Your comments are also disrespectful and uncalled for. This is your first warning. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban.

logs.name: charcoal-trap
logs.text: Oh, please, @moderator, you're just a power-hungry tyrant. You can't even handle a little bit of disagreement. This forum is supposed to be about free speech, not your personal censorship. And @devout-corduroy, you're just a coward hiding behind your keyboard. If you really believe what you say, say it to my face.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @charcoal-trap, that's enough. Your comments are also disrespectful and uncalled for. This is your first warning. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban.

logs.name: obsolete-arch
logs.text: Oh, look who's talking about free speech. @moderator, you're just as bad as the government trying to control what we can and can't say. And @charcoal-trap, you're just a keyboard warrior yourself. If you really want to stand up for your beliefs, why don't you run for office instead of hiding behind a screen name? And @devout-corduroy, you're just a troll. You're not even trying to have a real discussion. You're just here to stir up trouble.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @obsolete-arch, that's enough. This is your first warning. Please keep the discussion respectful and on topic. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban.

logs.name: corn-heater
logs.text: I think we all need to take a step back and remember that we're all here to discuss and learn from each other. I don't agree with everything that's been said, but I do think we can all do better. Let's try to keep the conversation respectful and focused on the issues, not on each other.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @obsolete-arch, please refrain from personal attacks and stay on topic. This is your second and final warning. Further disrespectful behavior will result in a ban.
